identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a sports betting SaaS that feels like a Bloomberg Terminal for professional gamblers—dense, dark, and ruthlessly efficient.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Sports broadcast energy.
Emotion First: The user should feel like a 'Tactical Operator' or 'Quant Trader'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Charts and numbers must be legible at a glance.
Negative Space: Use 'Bento' grids to separate dense data clusters.
Contrast: High-contrast neon against deep matte black for immediate signal recognition.

usage.headings: Use Barlow Condensed for all page titles and widget headers. Uppercase often works best here for the 'Scoreboard' feel.
usage.numbers: ALWAYS use JetBrains Mono for Odds, Stakes, financial amounts, and live timers. Tabular nums are mandatory.
usage.ui: Use Manrope for labels, buttons, and navigation.

structure.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]
structure.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, border-r border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur
structure.card: bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm text-card-foreground shadow-sm

Input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

data_models.Users: id, email, password_hash, full_name, created_at, preferences (json)
data_models.Transactions: id, user_id, bookmaker_id, type (deposit/withdrawal), amount, date, notes
data_models.Bets: id, user_id, bookmaker_id, strategy_id, sport, market, selection, odds, stake, status (pending/won/lost/void/cashout), return_amount, profit, date_placed, date_settled, notes, bet_type (single/multiple/arbitrage/freebet)

phase_1_setup.title: Core Foundation
steps: Initialize Tailwind with 'Performance Pro' colors and fonts.
Create 'Layout' component with Sidebar and Header.

phase_2_dashboard.title: Command Center
features: KPI Cards: Total Profit (Green/Red), ROI %, Win Rate %.
Recent Activity: Compact table of last 5 bets.

phase_3_betting_engine.title: Tactical Operations
features: Bet Logger Form: Inputs for Odds, Stake, Bookmaker (Select), Sport.

phase_4_analytics.title: Debriefing Room
features: Bookmaker Breakdown: Bar chart of profit by Bookie.
Strategy Performance: Table showing ROI per strategy.

freebet_snr.description: Stake Not Returned - maximize profit from free bet

universal_guidelines: Use data-testid for ALL interactive elements (e.g., 'submit-bet-btn', 'odds-input').
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid Zinc-950 or noise textures.
Ensure 100% responsive design - Tables must scroll horizontally on mobile.
